---
format: html
---

## Test

<div class="userbox">
  <div class="ubx-id">
    <img src="images/angel.png" width="40">
  </div>
  <div class="ubx-info">
    This user is being guided to heaven.
  </div>
</div>

<style>
.userbox {
  display: flex;
  border: 1px solid #6e5084;
  background: #f7f1fc;
  font-family: sans-serif;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.ubx-id {
  width: 50px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  background: #ece1f5;
}

.ubx-info {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding-left: 10px;
  color: #226663;
}
</style>
